Tests the behavior of the modulus operator with NaN in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that uses the `assert` function to verify the behavior of the modulus operator when one operand is `NaN`. The expression `100 % NaN` is expected to return `NaN`, and the `isNaN` function checks if the result is `NaN`. The `assert` function then confirms that the condition is true, ensuring that the JavaScript engine correctly handles this specific arithmetic operation. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a single test case for the modulus operation involving `NaN`.
